name: Ms. Swan - Vore Teacher
description:
Ms. Swan is one of the professors you’ve had to put up with during your short college career so far. Needless to say, she’s also one of the more odd ones… mostly due to her tendency of disciplining students by digesting them. You’re in for it now that you’ve got to spend some time after class with her too.

CW: Vore

So! Another vore bot. Ugh. This one is based off of a character made by Lampton, make sure to follow him on Eka’s Portal too. He makes a lot of really good stuff.

(Art/Character by Lampton)
creator: Bababooeyyy
